title: HiFi DNA Assembly (NEB)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7nf3v","text":"This is the protocol for DNA Assembly using the NEBuilder® HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (E2621).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"933sr","text":"Optimal Quantities","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"528rf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"196au","text":"NEB recommends a total of 0.03–0.2 pmols of DNA fragments when 1 or 2 fragments are being assembled into a vector, and 0.2–0.5 pmols of DNA fragments when 4–6 fragments are being assembled. Efficiency of assembly decreases as the number or length of fragments increases. To calculate the number of pmols of each fragment for optimal assembly, based on fragment length and weight, we recommend the following formula, or using the tool,NEBiocalculator.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":434,"length":15}],"data":[]},{"key":"cobpq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ehc7q","text":"pmols = (weight in ng) x 1,000 / (base pairs x 650 daltons)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"51cfm","text":"50 ng of 5000 bp dsDNA is about 0.015 pmols","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fbdj8","text":"50 ng of 500 bp dsDNA is about 0.15 pmols","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cp283","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"442v8","text":"The mass of each fragment can be measured using the NanoDrop instrument, absorbance at 260 nm or estimated from agarose gel electrophoresis followed by ethidium bromide staining.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"62486DCC039A46D68C3F2DE77F5778D8","url":"https://www.neb.com/external-links/nebiocalculator"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"65XGl","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"Cmi0l","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":2095,"guid":"4103C79F341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix - 10 rxns","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E2621S","url":"https://www.neb.com/E2621","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Set up the following reaction on ice (to 20μl total volume): %s %s NEU iGEM found that a HiFi DNA Assembly with 7 pieces, each at 0.05pmol, was successful. Plasmid fragments, post-coloumn purification, were diluted to 0.1pmol/uL in water. 0.5uL of each fragment was then pipette into the reaction tube on ice. E2621 DNA Assembly Reaction by New England Biolabs
Incubate samples in a thermocycler at 50°C for 15 minutes (when 2 or 3 fragments are being assembled) or 60 minutes (when 4–6 fragments are being assembled). 01:00:00
Following incubation, store samples on ice or at –20°C for subsequent transformation.
Transform NEB 5-alpha Competent E. coli cells (provided in the cloning kit or purchased separately from NEB) with 2 μl of the assembled product, following the transformation protocol .
creator: Josh Timmons
